derivations.physical_basis: 12 cube edges → gauge bosons, 4 body diagonals → Cartan generators
derivations.why_necessary: Cube is unique regular polytope with these properties in 3D

derivations.physical_basis: A₄ = tetrahedron symmetry, V₄ = unique normal subgroup
derivations.why_necessary: V₄ is the ONLY non-trivial normal subgroup of A₄

derivations.physical_basis: Gauge bosons / Cartan generators = copies of matter
derivations.why_necessary: G_SM is uniquely fixed by anomaly cancellation
N_gen = N_spatial is geometrically required by cube structure

derivations.physical_basis: CP² is minimal complex surface with χ = 3
derivations.why_necessary: Topological invariant fixed by manifold structure
Bianchi identity requires integer Chern classes

derivations.physical_basis: Orbifold fixed points and Wilson line holonomy
derivations.why_necessary: Orbifold geometry uniquely determines fermion zero modes

interpretation.n_gen_meaning: Complete matter copies needed to fill gauge structure
interpretation.physical_statement: Each generation fills BEKENSTEIN=4 slots of the gauge algebra. With GAUGE=12 total slots, we need N_gen=3 generations.
interpretation.alternative_view: The 12 cube edges (gauge structure) divided by 4 body diagonals (charge structure) gives 3 generations.

conclusion.significance: First-principles derivation of fermion generation number
